opposing_evidence: Same date (2025-05-05), same amount (590.00), same expense type (office_supplies) — coincidental but not a policy violation

exceptions_and_boundaries.article_10_boundary: Requires same invoice; invoices are different so boundary not crossed
exceptions_and_boundaries.article_11_boundary: Requires same employee; employees are different so boundary not crossed
exceptions_and_boundaries.budget_boundary: Combined 1180 vs 200000 annual budget; no boundary issue

rationale: The coincidental same-day/same-amount/same-type pattern across two different employees with different invoices from different vendors does not trigger any policy violation. Article 10 (duplicate reimbursement) requires the identical invoice number. Article 11 (split reimbursement) requires the same employee. Neither condition is met. The no-anomaly conclusion is correct.
